description: Values returned by mail server cluster

omailgw-api-url.description: Base URL of the built-in oMailGw API.

omailgw-ui-url.description: URL of the built-in oMailGw web interface.

omailgw-root-user.description: Administrator email for the built-in oMailGw instance.

omailgw-root-password.description: Administrator password for the built-in oMailGw instance.
